description_long: This is a sporty coupe car with a dynamic blue, white, and red livery, featuring aggressive graphics and sponsor decals such as HKS and ENKEI. The car has a low, aerodynamic profile with a prominent rear spoiler, blacked-out windows, and a vented hood. Its bodywork is streamlined, with flared wheel arches and side skirts that enhance its performance-oriented appearance. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with visible red brake calipers, suggesting high-performance braking capability. The front end is characterized by sharp headlights and a bold grille, while the rear features a distinctive taillight design and a large wing for added downforce. The overall design is reminiscent of Japanese tuner cars, built for speed and agility in urban or racing environments.
description: A sporty coupe car with blue, white, and red graphics, large rear spoiler, and racing decals. It features aggressive styling, blacked-out windows, and performance wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille, sharp headlights, vented hood, and HKS decal on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dynamic graphics, ENKEI decal, large alloy wheels, and side skirts.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent rear spoiler, taillight design, and blue-and-white graphics extending onto the trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same aggressive graphics, wheels, and side profile.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
